title: breakprogresshud
description: Shows a smooth, color-coded block break percentage under the crosshair.
body:
Break Progress HUD is a lightweight client-side mod that displays a smooth block break percentage under the crosshair.

Features:
- Smooth, FPS-independent animation
- Color-coded progress (red → yellow → green)
- Works with both hand and tools
- Configurable position and color usage
- Designed to complement Jade (no duplicate progress bar)

Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge
